style:
Create a pixel art sprite in the style of classic 16-bit RPGs like Ultima VII and Ultima VIII.

STYLE REQUIREMENTS:
- Pure pixel art with clean, crisp edges
- NO anti-aliasing or smoothing
- Limited color palette (max 32 colors)
- Warm tropical color scheme: terracotta, gold, cream, forest green, ocean blue, deep brown
- Subtle dithering for shading gradients
- Portuguese colonial Melaka setting (1580)
- Southeast Asian tropical atmosphere

tiles.name: cobblestone
tiles.prompt: Top-down cobblestone street tile, gray-brown stones with dark mortar gaps, worn Portuguese colonial style, seamless tileable pattern

tiles.name: grass-tropical
tiles.prompt: Top-down lush tropical grass tile, vibrant greens with small yellow flowers, Southeast Asian jungle floor, seamless tileable

tiles.name: water-harbor
tiles.prompt: Top-down calm harbor water tile, blue-green with subtle light ripples, reflective surface, seamless tileable

tiles.name: wood-dock
tiles.prompt: Top-down weathered wooden dock planks, gray-brown wood with gaps between boards, salt-stained nautical, seamless tileable

tiles.name: sand-beach
tiles.prompt: Top-down golden beach sand tile, warm tan color with tiny shell fragments and pebbles, seamless tileable

tiles.name: terracotta
tiles.prompt: Top-down terracotta clay floor tile, orange-red square tiles in grid pattern, Portuguese Mediterranean style, seamless tileable

tiles.name: white-wall
tiles.prompt: Front-facing whitewashed wall section, Portuguese colonial architecture, slight weathering and cracks, clean plaster

tiles.name: roof-tile
tiles.prompt: Top-down terracotta roof tiles, overlapping curved clay tiles in red-orange, Portuguese style, seamless tileable

characters.name: player
characters.prompt: Full body character sprite facing forward, young Portuguese merchant agent, clean-shaven with brown hair, wearing red/burgundy doublet with gold buttons, white collar visible, blue breeches, brown leather boots, standing pose, transparent background

characters.name: fernao-gomes
characters.prompt: Full body character sprite facing forward, wealthy older Portuguese merchant, gray beard, fine red velvet doublet with ornate gold trim, white ruff collar at neck, heavy gold chain of office, dark breeches, distinguished worried expression, transparent background

characters.name: capitao-rodrigues
characters.prompt: Full body character sprite facing forward, Portuguese military guard captain, wearing morion helmet (Spanish/Portuguese style), metal breastplate armor, red officer sash across chest, stern suspicious expression, hand resting on sword hilt, transparent background

characters.name: padre-tomas
characters.prompt: Full body character sprite facing forward, Jesuit Catholic priest, wearing long black cassock robe, white clerical collar, gold crucifix pendant on chain, tonsured head (bald crown with gray hair ring), gentle kind expression, hands clasped, transparent background

characters.name: aminah
characters.prompt: Full body character sprite facing forward, Malay woman market vendor, purple/pink tudung (headscarf), gold necklace, colorful silk baju kurung (traditional blouse), blue batik sarong with geometric patterns, warm friendly smile, transparent background

characters.name: chen-wei
characters.prompt: Full body character sprite facing forward, Chinese guild merchant representative, traditional black silk cap, long purple/magenta silk changshan robe with gold embroidery at edges, thin black mustache and short goatee, reserved dignified expression, hands hidden in sleeves, transparent background

characters.name: rashid
characters.prompt: Full body character sprite facing forward, Arab sailor from dhow ship, white keffiyeh headscarf with black agal rope, thick curly black beard, loose white cotton sailors shirt, blue cloth sash at waist, baggy sirwal pants, bare feet, jovial laughing expression, transparent background
